name: Login & Auth Protection
description: Very strict rate limiting designed for authentication endpoints. Prevents brute force attacks, credential stuffing, and account enumeration. Apply specifically to /login, /auth, /signin, /register paths.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Auth Endpoint Rate Limit
rules.notes: 1 req/s, 5 req/min, 30 req/hr. Very strict for login endpoints to prevent brute force.
